events.content: ORDER-1029 will be dispatched on 2023-04-15, estimated arrival by 2023-04-22.

SEARCH_DEPT : ORDER-1029 
FROM TABLE orders 
WHERE order_id = 'ORD-1029' 
AND DATE(order_dispatch) >= DATE(NOW()) - INTERVAL 5 DAY 
LIMIT 1
